_comment: GEO content matrix backlog for aeopic.com. Read + updated by the /geo-blog skill. After a post goes live, append its slug to publishedSlugs. Pilot city is built first.

cities.name: College Station
cities.hook: Aggieland / Texas A&M; ~40k-student fall-to-summer business swing; Northgate; research corridor (biotech, defense, aerospace)

cities.name: Bryan
cities.hook: Other half of the BCS metro; Historic Downtown Bryan revival; more blue-collar/established than CS

cities.name: Conroe
cities.hook: Fastest-growing city in Montgomery County; Lake Conroe; FM 105 vs downtown split

cities.name: Montgomery County
cities.hook: Woodlands corporate corridor + Conroe boomtown + Magnolia ranch-to-suburb; top-10 US growth, unevenly distributed

cities.name: Tomball
cities.hook: Oil & railroad town; Old Town Main Street; Grand Parkway 99 corridor pulling development away from downtown; German Festival

cities.name: Magnolia
cities.hook: Ranch country going suburban; FM 1488 growth corridor

cities.name: Manor
cities.hook: Fast-growing Austin-metro exurb east of Austin

formats.titlePattern: How Much Does a [Service] Cost in [City]? (2026)
[Service] in [City]: What Local Businesses Need to Know
